title: HushSpec Posture Extension v0
description: Schema for the HushSpec Posture extension. Declares a state machine for capability and budget management.

initial.description: Initial state name. Must reference a key in states.

states.description: Named states in the posture state machine.

transitions.description: Transitions between states, triggered by events.

PostureState.description: A named state in the posture state machine.

capabilities.description: Capability identifiers available in this state. Standard values: file_access, file_write, egress, shell, tool_call, patch, custom.

budgets.description: Budget limits keyed by budget key. Standard keys: file_writes, egress_calls, shell_commands, tool_calls, patches, custom_calls.

from.description: Source state name, or "*" to match any state.

to.description: Target state name. Must not be "*".

after.description: Duration string. Required when trigger is "timeout". Format: <number><unit> where unit is s, m, h, or d.
